steps.title: Recognize what a 1/2 exponent means
steps.content: A fractional exponent of $\frac{1}{2}$ always means taking a square root of the entire expression inside the parentheses. This is one of the most important exponent rules to memorize.

steps.title: Apply the rule to the given expression
steps.content:
Since $(158y)$ is raised to the power $\frac{1}{2}$, we apply the rule directly:
$$(158y)^{\frac{1}{2}} = \sqrt{158y}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
